metadata.description: Initial ACE playbook for NLP4RE PGMR-lite experiments.

bullets.title: Return only the query
bullets.content: Return only the final SPARQL or PGMR-lite query. Do not add explanations.

bullets.title: Use NLP4RE contribution pattern
bullets.content: Connect papers to contributions before accessing NLP4RE-specific fields.
bullets.avoid: Do not attach NLP task, dataset, metric, or output properties directly to ?paper.
